info.name: PDF Parser Backend API
info.description:
Test collection for the PDF Parser Backend.

This API accepts a raw medical lab report PDF, uses Vertex AI Gemini to extract all text, and returns a fully enriched JSON response containing:
- Extracted Patient Metadata (Name, Age, Gender, IDs)
- All test parameters grouped by profile
- AI status classifications (HIGH, LOW, NORMAL)
- Custom AI recommendations for abnormal results
- A top-level summary of the report state.

request.description: Simple endpoint to check if the PDF Parser Backend is running successfully.

formdata.description: 📎 SELECT YOUR LAB REPORT PDF FILE HERE

request.description:
## 📤 Upload a Lab Report PDF

**Instructions:**
1. In the `Body` tab, make sure `form-data` is selected.
2. Hover over the `VALUE` column next to `pdf` and click **Select Files**.
3. Choose any lab report PDF from your computer.
4. Click **Send**.

**Response:**
The response will be a JSON object containing:
1. `patient`: Extracted patient information.
2. `profiles`: Arrays of test results, complete with reference ranges, HIGH/LOW flags, and AI recommendations.
3. `summary`: An overall tally of the tests.
